name: collect_interests
description: Identify and cluster the founder's personal and professional interests from free-text input. Call after collecting skills to understand what excites the founder. Expects the founder's response about their passions and interests.

response.description: The founder's natural-language response about their passions and interests.

prior_interests.description: Previously collected interest clusters to merge with or refine.

clusters.description: Clustered interest themes extracted from the response.

summary.description: A brief narrative summary of the founder's interests.
